title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Delhivery

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Delhivery
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhivery. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
